psalm-113-1.verse:
Praise the Lord!
  Praise, O servants of the Lord,
  Praise the name of the Lord.
psalm-113-1.prayer: Lord, help me praise You as Your servant. Let my heart bless Your name with joy, humility, and gratitude.

psalm-113-2.verse:
Blessed be the name of the Lord
  From this time forth and forever.
psalm-113-2.prayer: Father, blessed be Your name now and forever. Teach me to honor You in every season of life.

psalm-113-3.verse:
From the rising of the sun to its setting
  The name of the Lord is to be praised.
psalm-113-3.prayer: Lord, from sunrise to sunset, let Your name be praised. Fill my days with worship and thanksgiving.

psalm-113-4.verse:
The Lord is high above all nations;
  His glory is above the heavens.
psalm-113-4.prayer: Father, You are high above all nations, and Your glory is above the heavens. Help me live in awe of Your greatness.

psalm-113-5.verse:
Who is like the Lord our God,
  Who is enthroned on high,
psalm-113-5.prayer: Lord, there is no one like You. Teach me to trust Your majesty, holiness, and sovereign rule.

psalm-113-6.verse:
Who humbles Himself to behold
  The things that are in heaven and in the earth?
psalm-113-6.prayer: Father, thank You for humbling Yourself to look upon heaven and earth with care and compassion.

psalm-113-7.verse:
He raises the poor from the dust
  And lifts the needy from the ash heap,
psalm-113-7.prayer: Lord, thank You for lifting the poor from the dust. Raise up what feels low, forgotten, or broken in my life.

psalm-113-8.verse:
To make them sit with princes,
  With the princes of His people.
psalm-113-8.prayer: Father, thank You for giving dignity, purpose, and honor to those You lift by Your grace.

psalm-113-9.verse:
He makes the barren woman abide in the house
  As a joyful mother of children.
  Praise the Lord!
psalm-113-9.prayer: Lord, thank You for bringing joy, belonging, and fruitfulness where there has been emptiness. Fill my life with praise.

psalm-113-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for being high above all nations and yet near to the humble, needy, and broken. Teach me to praise Your name from morning to evening and trust Your compassionate care. Lift what is low, restore what feels empty, and fill my life with joy, dignity, and worship. May my heart bless Your name now and forever.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
